Name  Mtu   Network       Address            Ipkts Ierrs     Ibytes    Opkts Oerrs     Obytes  Coll
lo0   16384 <Link#1>                         12345     0    1234567    12345     0    1234567     0
lo0   16384 127           localhost          12345     -          -    12345     -          -     -
lo0   16384 ::1/128     ::1                  12345     -          -    12345     -          -     -
en0   1500  <Link#6>      aa:bb:cc:dd:ee:ff  99999     0   67890123    54321     0   98765432     0
en0   1500  192.168.1     192.168.1.100          -     -          -        -     -          -     -
en1   1500  <Link#7>      11:22:33:44:55:66  11111     0    2222222     3333     0    4444444     0
